title: Converting a Group to a Board
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is it possible to convert a group to a board? 
For instance once a group has been approved it becomes a project and needs to be a board. 
Thank you

posts.author: Roxsie (Roxanne Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is it possible to convert a group to a board?

For instance once a group has been approved it becomes a project and needs to be a board.

Thank you

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Roxsie

Welcome to the community. Yes you can do that through the group menu, see

image1010×946 65.8 KB

Is that what you are looking for?

posts.author: Roxsie (Roxanne Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I don’t want to move it to another board. I want to turn it into a board

Thank you

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Each board has always at the minimum one group. Items are always listed unde a group, never directly at the board level. So it will take two actions: create a board and move the items. Or alternativly duplicate the board and remove the other groups from the duplicated board.

posts.author: Roxsie (Roxanne Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml: And then manually turn the subitems into groups?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: ohh ok, didn’t know subitems were involved. Can you explain in a little more detail?

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
